testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
16:52:52.370 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.Gestion.Usuarios.UsuariosApplicationTests]: UsuariosApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:52:52.510 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.Gestion.Usuarios.UsuariosApplication for test class com.Gestion.Usuarios.UsuariosApplicationTests

:: Spring Boot :: (v3.5.7)

Found 1 JPA repository interface. 2025-11-26T16:52:55.219-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2025-11-26T16:52:55.314-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.6.33.Final 2025-11-26T16:52:55.367-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2025-11-26T16:52:55.533-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2025-11-26T16:52:55.572-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2025-11-26T16:52:55.765-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA 2025-11-26T16:52:55.767-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2025-11-26T16:52:55.789-03:00 WARN 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: MySQL8Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2025-11-26T16:52:55.789-03:00 WARN 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000026: MySQL8Dialect has been deprecated; use org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLDialect instead 2025-11-26T16:52:55.814-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.connections.pooling : HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [Connecting through datasource 'HikariDataSource (HikariPool-1)'] Database driver: undefined/unknown Database version: 8.0 Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2025-11-26T16:52:56.518-03:00 INFO 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2025-11-26T16:52:56.545-03:00 WARN 31492 --- [Usuarios] [ main] o.h.t.s.i.ExceptionHandlerLoggedImpl : GenerationTarget encountered exception accepting command : Error executing DDL " create table users ( email varchar(255) not null, id varchar(255) not null, last_name varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB" via JDBC [Error de Sintaxis en sentencia SQL "\000d\000a create table users (\000d\000a email varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a id varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a last_name varchar(255),\000d\000a name varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a password varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a role varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a primary key (id)\000d\000a ) engine[*]=InnoDB"; se esperaba "identifier" Syntax error in SQL statement "\000d\000a create table users (\000d\000a email varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a id varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a last_name varchar(255),\000d\000a name varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a password varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a role varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a primary key (id)\000d\000a ) engine[*]=InnoDB"; expected "identifier";]
org.hibernate.tool.schema.spi.CommandAcceptanceException: Error executing DDL " create table users ( email varchar(255) not null, id varchar(255) not null, last_name varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) engine=InnoDB" via JDBC [Error de Sintaxis en sentencia SQL "\000d\000a create table users (\000d\000a email varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a id varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a last_name varchar(255),\000d\000a name varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a password varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a role varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a primary key (id)\000d\000a ) engine[*]=InnoDB"; se esperaba "identifier" Syntax error in SQL statement "\000d\000a create table users (\000d\000a email varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a id varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a last_name varchar(255),\000d\000a name varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a password varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a role varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a primary key (id)\000d\000a ) engine[*]=InnoDB"; expected "identifier";] at org.hibernate.tool.schema.internal.exec.GenerationTargetToDatabase.accept(GenerationTargetToDatabase.java:94)
